payload.query: The concept of political polarization is an important question in American politics, but its origins and consequences have been the subject of considerable debate. Use the relevant literature to describe the possible causes of political polarization. Touch on the debate about the relative levels of polarization in the mass public, elites, and members of Congress. Then describe the possible consequences of polarization, citing relevant sources.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court Decision
articles.abstract: The Supreme Court ruled that the race-conscious admissions programs at Harvard and the University of North Carolina were unlawful, curtailing affirmative action at colleges and universities around the nation.
